name: Escape from the Station
description: The station's defense fleet scrambles as the party makes their escape. Three interceptors move to cut off the exit vector.

routine.description: The interceptor focuses fire on the nearest target.

actions.name: Laser Cannon
actions.description: Fire laser cannon at target ship

starshipActions.name: Evasive Maneuvers
starshipActions.description: The pilot performs evasive maneuvers to avoid incoming fire.

outcomes.criticalSuccess: The ship gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex until the start of your next turn.
outcomes.success: The ship gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.
outcomes.criticalFailure: The ship is off-balance; it takes a -1 circumstance penalty to AC until the start of your next turn.
